title: homopappus spathulatus
intro: Homopappus spathulatus, also known as the cushion bush or Homopappus, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Homopappus spathulatus include relief from fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Traditional herbal preparations of Homopappus spathulatus include teas, infusions, and tinctures made from the roots, leaves, and flowers of the plant.
